name: Shellmon
description: A hermit crab-like Digimon that lives in the shallower seabeds of the " Net Ocean ". Although it has a turtle-like appearance when settled inside its shell, it actually has a soft body like that of a mollusk. Because its body rapidly gets bigger as it grows, it switches homes each time until it reaches the size of a small mountain. Not only that, it has a habit of settling into anything it is able to fit its body into. Since it has low intelligence and a belligerent personality, one must take caution when coming across a Shellmon. Its Special Move is shooting liquid at high pressure ( Hydro Pressure ).
